evidence: Our framework, termed Vision ARC (VARC), achieves 60.4% accuracy... substantially outperforming existing methods.
Motivated by its visual nature, we approach ARC from a vision-centric perspective. Abstraction and inference can arise directly from visual learning.
VARC achieves 54.5% accuracy... This result substantially surpasses the best recurrent methods.
